message.content:
1) **Email visibility**: The email `johnshannonrodriguez20@gmail.com` is fully visible and contained within the screen width. It does not overflow or get cut off in either the button or the text below it.  
2) **Button aesthetics**: The button looks good. It is properly sized (fits the email text without truncation), readable (clear contrast against the dark background), and includes a clean arrow icon on the right.  
3) **Overflow/layout issues**: No overflow or layout issues are present. The button and surrounding elements (email text, phone section) are well-spaced and fit within the screen without clipping.
